---
title: "World Bank Pink Sheet Indices"
format: html

execute:
  enabled: true
---

This site tracks price indices for selected commodity groups from the World Bank’s Pink Sheet, updated monthly. The indices are expressed in nominal US dollars and normalized to 2010 = 100.

_Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")`_

![](assets/plots/pink_sheet_indices.png){fig-alt="Time-series plot of the Energy, Grains, Oils and Meals, and Fertilizers indices."}
